name: Toxic Gas Dispersion — Gaussian Plume Ground-Level Concentration & IDLH Exclusion Zone
subtitle: Process Safety | Environmental Engineering — EPA 40 CFR Part 68 RMP §68.22, NIOSH IDLH database

inScope: Toxic Gas Dispersion — Gaussian Plume Ground-Level Concentration & IDLH Exclusion Zone
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: IDLH Concentration of Gas (Immediately Dangerous to Life/Health)

standards.name: Toxic Gas Dispersion — Gaussian Plume Ground-Level Concentration & IDLH Exclusion Zone
standards.description: Toxic Gas Dispersion — Gaussian Plume Ground-Level Concentration & IDLH Exclusion Zone — Process Safety, Environmental Engineering

formulas.expression: const PG = { A:{a:0.22,b:0.0001,c:0.20,d:0}, B:{a:0.16,b:0.0001,c:0.12,d:0}, C:{a:0.11,b:0.0002,c:0.08,d:0.0002}, D:{a:0.08,b:0.0015,c:0.06,d:0.0015}, E:{a:0.06,b:0.0015,c:0.03,d:0.0003}, F:{a:0.04,b:0.0015,c:0.016,d:0.0003} }; const p = PG[stability_class]; const x = 500; sigma_y = p.a * x * Math.pow(1 + p.b * x, -0.5); sigma_z = p.c * x * Math.pow(1 + p.d * x, -0.5)   // [m] Pasquill-Gifford Dispersion Coefficients at Downwind Distance x Reference: Pasquill-Gifford sigma curves — Slade (1968); Turner Workbook on Atmospheric Dispersion §3

release_rate_kg_s / (Math.PI * sigma_y * sigma_z * wind_speed_m_s) * Math.exp(-0.5 * Math.pow(release_height_m / sigma_z, 2)); C_ppm = C_kg_m3 * 1e6 / (molecular_weight_g_mol / 1000) * 22.4 / molecular_weight_g_mol * 1000
formulas.reference: Gaussian plume model — EPA AERMOD guidance

formulas.expression: let D = 50; for(let i=0;i<200;i++){ const p = {A:[0.22,0.0001,0.20,0],B:[0.16,0.0001,0.12,0],C:[0.11,0.0002,0.08,0.0002],D:[0.08,0.0015,0.06,0.0015],E:[0.06,0.0015,0.03,0.0003],F:[0.04,0.0015,0.016,0.0003]}[stability_class]; const sy=p[0]*D*Math.pow(1+p[1]*D,-0.5); const sz=p[2]*D*Math.pow(1+p[3]*D,-0.5); const C=release_rate_kg_s/(Math.PI*sy*sz*wind_speed_m_s)*Math.exp(-0.5*Math.pow(release_height_m/sz,2))*1e6/(molecular_weight_g_mol/22400)*1000; if(C < IDLH_ppm) break; D+=25; } D_IDLH_m = D   // [m] IDLH Exclusion Zone Radius (D_IDLH) — Iterative Search Reference: Iterative downwind search to find distance where C_centreline = IDLH — EPA RMP methodology

const p2 = {A:[0.22,0.0001],B:[0.16,0.0001],C:[0.11,0.0002],D:[0.08,0.0015],E:[0.06,0.0015],F:[0.04,0.0015]}[stability_class]; sigma_y_IDLH = p2[0]*D_IDLH_m*Math.pow(1+p2[1]*D_IDLH_m,-0.5); plume_width_m = 2.15 * sigma_y_IDLH   // [m] Plume Width at IDLH Boundary Reference: Plume half-width at IDLH = 2.15σ_y (contains ~97% of crosswind concentration)

formulas.reference: Dense gas criterion: ρ_gas > 1.5 kg/m³ at STP → SLAB / PHAST model recommended over Gaussian

formulas.expression: IDLH_ppm * 0.3; time_in_zone_s = D_IDLH_m / wind_speed_m_s; TL = C_ppm * Math.pow(time_in_zone_s / 600, 1.0)
formulas.reference: Toxic load concept — TNO Yellow Book §4

warnings.message: Worst-case dispersion conditions (Class F, low wind): exclusion zone maximised — this scenario governs emergency planning zone; shelter-in-place radius = D_IDLH
Very toxic gas (IDLH < 50 ppm): small release rates generate large exclusion zones — verify passive mitigation (water curtain, scrubber) reduces source term
Large zone in urban terrain: building effects invalidate Gaussian model; use AERMOD or CFD simulation for planning purposes per EPA guidance
Large ground-level release: immediate shelter-in-place or evacuation of D_IDLH radius; notify emergency services per OSHA PSM 29 CFR 1910.119
Transit time through IDLH zone > 10 min: self-contained breathing apparatus (SCBA) mandatory for emergency responders entering zone per OSHA §1910.134

verdictText.warn: PASS — High Utilization: Peer Review Required
